messages.body: Thank you for calling Skin M Aesthetics Advanced Skin Care. To make an appointment, please go to SkinMA.com. That's Skin M as in Mary, A as in Apple, dot com.

Subject: Apologies for the Charge and Refund Update\n\nBody: Dear Evelyn, I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to personally reach out and sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused. It has come to our atte…

Subject: Apologies for the Charge and Refund Update\n\nBody: Dear Evelyn, I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to personally reach out and sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused. It has come to our atte…
I'm just checking this.
Did you receive the mail, Evelyn?
No  I never received the email.

Thank you for calling Skin and Mastectics. How can I help you? Evelyn, this is Raj from Zocup. Hi, Raj. How are you? I'm good, Evelyn. How are you? Good. Evelyn, in the next couple of minutes, you're going to be getting …
Over the mail would be great
Raj, I was expecting your call or confirmation as you promised yesterday.
I already had a word with my team regarding this and they said it will be done.  How do I give you a confirmation? Do you want it over a mail?

Hi Raj, this is Evelin from  skin M aesthetics I wanted to inform you that the $299 charge is still on my bank account. It\'s  December 16 today  and I talked to you December 9 when you apologized that your team charged …
skinmaesthetics@gmail.com

Yes Raj, The problem is, you keep saying that since December 9th today is the 17th  I expect you to have this done by end of today, so we can put an end to this professionally and I don\'t have to go any further. Thank y…
I will ask the team to share it across. Rest assured, it will be done from our end.

Hello. Hi. Good morning. Yes. Yes. Yes. Yes. I've saved your number. Please tell me. Yes. I don't understand why did you charge me $300 today? Did it did it deduct? I told the team not to do it. Yeah, but you still charg…
We can get into a meeting for further process and off boarding!

This is getting really uncomfortable! I kindly asked ￼you several times to close the account and send me a confirmation of it please. No meeting no call no zoom  just simply closing the account. I truly appreciate it. Th…
Alright!
Let’s do it this way.  You don’t have to bare the charges for next month and then we will see a month after, where we stand and what can be done!
Sure
Will that work for you?
Evelyn, taking off is very easy but what I want to do is make you see results, even just for once and then you can decide after that if you wanna continue or not!
Let me know your availability!
As I said, I won’t need a Zoca services so I kindly ask you to cancel my account and send me a confirmation of it. Thank you.

Thank you for calling. How can I help you? Hey, hi, Evelyn. How are you? Who am I talking to? Evelyn, this is Raj calling you from Zoka. Hey, how are you? How are you, Evelyn? It's been a while. Are you doing well? I'm n…
Hi, Please go ahead and cancel my account, and email me a confirmation of it. I won't need your services any longer. Thank you  skin M aesthetics
Dont worry, I am here to help you out to make your business grow.
I no longer need Zoca services, so just please go ahead and cancel my account and send me a confirmation appreciate it. Thank you.
Hello Evelyn, We did connect today. I told you I have raised the an analysis and I will be having data by Wednesday and we can discuss about improvement!

But if you remember our first meeting, all this optimisation and results will take time. It’s not even a month yet. I would request you to bare with me, if nothing works out, I will take special approvals and help you, d…

Sure,no problem
Ready whenever you are. I am waiting for you to join in.
Hey Evelyn
Wednesday im available that time  12-1
Alright!
Lets do 10 to 10.30?
I am so sorry Evelyn
Im booked  after 12 until 6
I have sent the invite. You would  have received the latest mail, just accept that one. You can ignore the few which I cancelled!
Any chance?
Wednesday wont be possible at that time.
Let’s do it tomorrow then. I will push a meeting up or down then to make it up to you.
Will that work?
Today I am all booked. For tomorrow will it be possible for you between  12 to 1?
Perfect see you at 10:30
Yes, just now  we rescheduled it for tomorrow at 10:30 AM
Okay, perfect, I'm sorry for this.
No problem

No problem ,in the future please ￼ please let me know if you cannot attend in time or if you want to reschedule.  I’m available today after 3 PM or tomorrow between 10 AM to 12  Let me know what would work for you best. …
I am so sorry, I couldn’t join our meeting on time. The previous meeting took a lot more time than intended and I couldn’t attend you!
Hey Evelin, I hope you are doing well.
Apologies for the experience, Evelin! Bikash is reaching out to you right now. He will assist you with everything.
Thank you.
Thanks for highlighting this and getting this to my attention, it shall not happen again.
I hope the call happened, Evelin?
Hello Evelin, I am very sorry to hear this.  Let me just check this at the earliest.

Hello, I was online and waiting for our scheduled 12:30 PM Zoom call today, but no one from your team attended or reached out. This raises serious concerns about your company’s reliability, especially since I hired your …
Hey Evelin, Logo has been changed!
Now to the cover picture! The cover picture which we have right now? Will that work or if you have a different cover picture in mind then share it to me!
I checked your series on booking platform, it matches with the services on Zoca landing page. I don’t see any discrepancy as mentioned by you.
